creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #0)
> nvidia-driver 390-143 pkg is working until kernel stable/13-ec47ee78b, later not
Are you referring to pre-built 390-143 package on the cluster, i.e., as offered by the "pkg install"?  Did you try to build your own package on post-stable/13-ec47ee78b system manually, via "make DISTVERSION=390.143 -DNO_CHECKSUM"?

> nvidia-driver-390-144 port is not working with any version, 13 release or stable
Interesting.  I'll try to see what might have changed between these versions; in the meantime, try downgrading to -143 first.
